name: Hexillume
short_description: Connect the hexagons to light them up. Experience beautiful colour themes in every level. Discover new hexagon types as you progress.
detailed_description:
Hexillume is a relaxing, minimalist puzzle game.


How to play

Move the hexagons so their triangles are pointing towards another triangle. When all the triangles are lit up, the hexagon will light up. Light up all the hexagons to complete the level. Some hexagons cannot be moved, but can be rotated, flipped and more.

Levels start easy and gradually get more difficult.
Use hints to help solve tricky levels!


Features

* 85 levels to beat
* A relaxing soundtrack
* Easy to play
* No time limit
* Earn a crown in every level by beating it in the perfect amount of moves
